title: System Response to External Input: The Zero-State Response
summary: This page is a figure-based explanation of how to find the zero-state response to an arbitrary input by decomposing the input into narrow pulses and corresponding weighted impulses. It shows the impulse response h(t), shifted responses h(t−nΔτ), incremental outputs x(nΔτ)h(t−nΔτ)Δτ, and their summation into the total output y(t).

figures.caption: Finding the system response to an arbitrary input x(t).
